name: Filesystem duplicates
summary: Find duplicate files in any folder and copy small artifacts over fs:// URIs.
description: fs:// turns duplicate detection and small artifact transfer into first-class URI operations instead of ad-hoc shell + sha256sum/scp. fs://host/duplicates/query/find scans a folder tree and returns groups of duplicate files; fs://host/duplicates/command/move quarantines extras into <root>/_duplicates/<key>/; fs://host/file/query/read-b64 and fs://host/file/command/write-b64 copy small files such as scanner PDFs between host and node without SSH.

optional: pillow + imagehash (or img2nl) for perceptual image mode

useCases: Find byte-identical duplicate files in a folder tree.
Detect near-duplicate images by perceptual hash.
Quarantine the extra copies of exported invoices.
Copy scanner PDFs to a node Downloads folder without SSH.
